name: startup-workflow
description: A staged product initiation workflow that moves ideas to MVP scope.

interface.shortDescription: A gated 0-1 workflow from idea to MVP scope.
interface.longDescription: A packaged 0-1 product initiation workflow for AI agents. It combines a control-plane orchestrator with seven gated review stages so teams can move from a rough idea to a reviewable MVP scope without skipping validation steps.
defaultPrompt: Start a 0-1 workflow from this new product idea.
Continue the current product initiation workflow.
Inspect workflow status and recommend the next stage.
